Aegislash-Both.reason: No separate neutral team-preview icon is expected; use shield form until a user-labeled template says otherwise.

Basculegion.reason: Pokemon Showdown base name maps to PokeAPI male default.

Basculegion-F.reason: Pokemon Showdown -F suffix maps to PokeAPI female form.

Gourgeist.reason: PokeAPI names the default size explicitly.

Lycanroc.reason: Pokemon Showdown base name maps to midday form.

Maushold.reason: Pokemon Showdown base Maushold maps to family-of-three; Maushold-Four maps to family-of-four.

Maushold-Four.reason: Pokemon Showdown Maushold-Four maps to family-of-four.

Meowstic.reason: Pokemon Showdown base name maps to male form.

Meowstic-F.reason: Pokemon Showdown -F suffix maps to PokeAPI female form.

Meowstic-F-Mega.reason: Champions custom form uses the PokeAPI female mega identifier when present.

Meowstic-M-Mega.reason: Champions custom form uses the PokeAPI male mega identifier.

Mimikyu.reason: PokeAPI names the default disguise state explicitly.

Morpeko.reason: PokeAPI names the default mode explicitly.

Palafin.reason: Pokemon Showdown base name maps to zero form.

Polteageist-Antique.reason: Use the default Polteageist visual unless an antique-specific template is added.

Pyroar.reason: Pokemon Showdown base name maps to male form.

Sinistcha-Masterpiece.reason: Use default Sinistcha art unless a masterpiece-specific template is added.

Vivillon-Fancy.reason: Use default Vivillon art unless a pattern-specific template is added.

Vivillon-Pokeball.reason: Use default Vivillon art unless a pattern-specific template is added.
